description: Red short Sleeve sleeves polo neck t-shirt made of 100% polyester, ribbed collar, fabric tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, three white stripes on the shoulders signifying adidas' logo, contoured black panels that flow to the sides, Short Sleeve buttoned placket, embroidered brand name and logo on the left chest, embroidered cricket ball on the left sleeve, and engineered with the ClimaCool technology
